title: Undercover Nerd
description: Action star Rainier Wolfcastle takes on one of the toughest places on the planet: high school.
quote: The geek shall inherit the Earth.
altHero: Rainier Wolfcastle in a high school wearing a bowtie and thick black glasses
alt1: bullies beating up some smaller kids
alt2: bully talking with Rainier, but he is quite small in comparison
alt3: bullies talking to Rainier by the lockers
alt4: one of the bullies has been shoved through the torso of the other bully
